windows, are rendering very slow.. Nothing more, help please?

I use geforce 4 card.

```

#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
```

### Post by darkchron on 2006-07-28
im sorry my atitude, i have been looking for months now.

I had ubuntu dapper installed, it worked perfectly fine, no lag..
I have made a new install, just on another harddisk (Same type of harddisk).
But this one lags, it is really annoying. Thanks.

---

### Post by 23meg on 2006-07-28
Try enabling / disabling AGP with the NvAGP xorg.conf option. Also make sure RenderAccel is on (right now it's not in your xorg.conf), and get rid of that DRI line at the bottom.

---

### Post by darkchron on 2006-07-29
Thank you, actually that made things a little bit faster..
i now got into getting me xgl + compiz, and actually that made everything go smooth again, weird stuff :KS

---

### Post by 23meg on 2006-07-29
Happy to hear that. Please keep it cooler next time and do your research before bursting out with such a harsh tone.

---
